zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeremiah Seymour於1630年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾奧爾尼時，他的父親Edward Seymour20歲，母親Anne Portman20歲。他於大約1650年與Ann Kennedy在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1683年9月21日在他的家鄉享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeremiah Seymour于1630年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾奧爾尼时，他的父亲Edward Seymour20岁，母亲Anne Portman20岁。他于大约1650年与Ann Kennedy在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1683年9月21日在他的家乡享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯。

nameMeanings.name: Seymour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), and possibly also from Saint-Maur-des-Bois (Manche) and Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine), named from the dedication of their churches to Saint Maur (see   Moore   3). The family of this name who have held the title Duke of Somerset since 1547 are said by some to have originated in Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), while others claim they are from Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine). They rose to prominence under the Tudors, when Edward Seymour (died 1552) held a high position of office under Henry VIII, who was married to Edward's sister, Jane. The Norman name has been established in Ireland since at least the 17th century.

variants.name: Moore
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Semar
meanings: Germanized form of French Saint Marc, the name of a Huguenot family that migrated to the Palatinate.
English: variant of   Seymour  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Jeremiah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Meaning ‘appointed by God’ in Hebrew; it was borne in the Bible by a Hebrew prophet of the 7th–6th centuries  bc , whose story, prophecies of judgement, and lamentations are recorded in the book of the Bible that bears his name. The Book of Lamentations is also attributed to him; it bewails the destruction of Jerusalem and the temple by the Babylonians in  587   bc . Despite (or because of) the gloomy subject matter of these texts, the name enjoyed some popularity among Puritans from the 16th century onwards and later Christian fundamentalists, partly perhaps because Jeremiah also preached reconciliation with God after his wrath was assuaged. Since the 1970s it has found considerable favour in the United States.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Jeremiah Seymour was born in 1630, in Olney, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Edward Seymour, was 20 and his mother, Anne Portman, was 20. He married Ann Kennedy about 1650, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 21 September 1683, in his hometown, at the age of 53, and was buried in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeremiah Seymour est né en 1630, à Olney, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Edward Seymour, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Anne Portman, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Ann Kennedy environ 1650, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 21 septembre 1683, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Jeremiah Seymour(이)가 1630년 영국 벅잉함실르 니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Seymour(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Portman(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1650년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Ann Kennedy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1683년 9월 21일 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 미턴 케인스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeremiah Seymour nasceu em 1630, em Olney, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward Seymour, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Anne Portman, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Kennedy aproximadamente 1650, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 21 de setembro de 1683, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeremiah Seymour родился в 1630 г. в местности олни, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edward Seymour было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Portman, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Kennedy около 1650 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 21 сентября 1683 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности милтон кинесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
